emails.subject: RE: Enron/TXU Exposure summary
emails.body: RE: Enron/TXU Exposure summary What date is the termination date? Are these values as of last night? Dec. 2nd? Need to know which date to calculate. Thanks

emails.subject: RE: Enron/TXU Exposure summary
emails.body: I'm assuming it is as of Jan 3, since that's what's on the schedule, but I put a call into TXU to verify this.

emails.subject: RE: Enron/TXU Exposure summary
emails.body: RE: Enron/TXU Exposure summary U.S gas as of Dec. 2. (Nov.30): $120,130.200 Including Dec. $114,022,275 Excluding Dec.
